label: LATE SHIPMENT
contract_clause: Shipment must cross Bolivian border before 2026-04-05T00:00:00Z
court_question: Did the shipment cross the Bolivian border on or before 2026-04-05?

exporter_evidence.label: Exporter Evidence
exporter_evidence.description: SGS pre-shipment inspection report — 2026-04-02, but goods remained in warehouse per SGS addendum

importer_evidence.label: Importer Evidence
importer_evidence.description: COSCO bill of lading clearly dated 2026-04-09 — four days after deadline

settlement_consequence: Settlement cancelled. Importer receives full refund of 73,950 PEN.
